content.full_text:
July 26, 2001

John F. Barna
1002 Cottonwood Drive
Roseville, CA 95661

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-162

Dear Mr. Barna:

This correspondence memorializes our July 24, 2001 conversation regarding the withdrawal of your June 29, 2001 letter to the Fair Political Practices Commission, requesting hypothetical advice on post-employment issues. (Regulation 18329(c).) I enclose a copy of the regulation and our fact sheet on "Revolving Door and Other Post-Employment Issues" for your review.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William L. Williams, Jr.
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

Enc.
WLW/jg
